title: metastelma eulaxiflorum
intro: Metastelma eulaxiflorum is a plant species also known as the 'Yellow Metastelma' or 'Coral Milk Vine', which belongs to the Apocynaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which contain alkaloids that exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Traditionally, Metastelma eulaxiflorum is prepared as a decoction or infusion by boiling its roots in water, and is used in herbal remedies in some parts of the world.
